{"step_by_step_thinking": "EBV (Epstein-Barr virus) and HPV (Human papillomavirus) are known to be associated with squamous cell carcinoma of the head and neck. Betel nut chewing is also a recognized risk factor for developing this type of cancer. However, there is no direct evidence linking vitamin A to squamous cell carcinoma of the head and neck. The documents provided do not mention vitamin A as a cause of squamous cell carcinoma.", "answer_choice": "D"}
